info.title: App Template Register
info.description: Register containing all schemas for the App Template application.

x-openregister.description: App Template — replace with your app description

example.title: Example
example.description: Example schema — replace with your app's actual schemas.

title.description: The title of the example object

example-gemeente-utrecht.title: Gemeente Utrecht pilot
example-gemeente-utrecht.description: Seed example — realistic pilot project for a Dutch municipality. Per ADR-001, every app MUST include 3-5 realistic objects per schema so the app is immediately demonstrable after install.

example-conduction-consultancy.title: Conduction consultancy engagement
example-conduction-consultancy.description: Seed example — consultancy engagement covering architecture review and ADR authoring. Values are fictional but realistic.

example-travel-agency.title: Nieuw Horizon travel agency onboarding
example-travel-agency.description: Seed example — third organisation type to demonstrate variety. Re-importing is idempotent: ImportHandler matches by slug.
